customManagers.description: TEMPLATE: track the version of the extension under test (EXTENSION_NAME) pinned in the system-tests workflow. The worked example uses test-data (GitHub releases); repoint depName/datasource/registry at your extension. If your extension publishes only -SNAPSHOT builds to JFrog, mirror the admin-utility manager below (maven + JFrog) and add ignoreUnstable: false in packageRules.
Track the admin-utility extension version pinned in the system-tests workflow (JFrog Maven repo)
Track the test-data extension version pinned in the system-tests workflow (GitHub releases)
Track the Polarion Docker image pinned in the system-tests workflow (JFrog Docker registry; YYMM-N tag scheme)

packageRules.description: Merge the system-test version bumps straight from the branch without opening a PR (includes majors). Scoped to system-tests.yml so the inherited preset's custom.regex manager (e.g. python-sbb-polarion in pyproject.toml) keeps its normal flow
